response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React (Ember.js), Nest.js (Node.js), and PostgreSQL (MongoDB), aligning well with the required skills. His background includes scalable systems, API integration, and clean architecture, with notable achievements like optimizing high-traffic platforms. While his AWS/Kubernetes experience is limited, his adaptability and depth in other areas make him a strong candidate for the role.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and fullstack expertise with React/Node.js, matching core job requirements.
Proven track record in scalable systems (handling millions of requests, Direct Mail automation).
Strong architectural skills with clean code practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development).
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (uses MongoDB and MySQL instead).
No explicit mention of AWS services (ECS, EKS, RDS, etc.) or Kubernetes in recent roles.
Recent roles focus on staff-level engineering (re:cinq) and AI tools, which may overshadow junior/mid-level contributions.
